---
name: Release Prep
about: Prepare one concrete release candidate for publication
title: "Prepare v"
labels: ["task", "area:release"]
assignees: []
---

## Why
Why is this release being prepared now?

## Scope
What shipped changes are intended for this release?

## Done when
- [ ] version metadata updated
- [ ] changelog entry added or refreshed
- [ ] testing baseline refreshed
- [ ] Linux Go 1.26 validation passed
- [ ] release-prep notes generated
- [ ] prep commit pushed to `main`

## Notes
Include any superseded release-attempt context, special verification, or
distribution considerations here.
